Settings.title: Settings
Settings.connectorsDescription: Configure the external services used by your Teams.
Settings.connectorsScope: Connections, encrypted credentials and automation rules remain scoped to the selected Team.
Settings.noManagedTeams: You must be the Manager of a Team to configure its connectors.
Settings.setupDesc: Google sign-in created your account. Create your first organization to unlock teams, incidents, and the war room.
Settings.deleteModalDesc: This permanently deletes {email}. If you are the only member of your organization, it will also be deleted. If there are other members, you must transfer your Manager role first. Type DELETE to confirm.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.user_already_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalid_token: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.must_transfer_manager_first: Transfer the Manager role (or delete the organization) before deleting your account.
errors.oauth_not_configured: Google sign-in is not available right now.
errors.oauth_failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.team_not_found: No team matches this invitation code.
errors.already_member: You are already a member of this team.
errors.member_not_found: This user is not a member of the team.
errors.not_manager: Only the team Manager may perform this action.
errors.already_manager: This user is already the team Manager.
errors.invalid_role: Role must be Observer or Responder.
errors.cannot_change_manager_role: The Manager role can only change through a transfer.
errors.manager_cannot_leave: The Manager cannot leave; transfer the role or delete the team.
errors.forbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action.
errors.assignee_not_responder: The assignee must be a Responder or Manager of the team.
errors.cannot_moderate_manager: The team manager cannot be kicked or banned.
errors.user_banned: You are banned from this team.
errors.invalid_ban_expiry: A temporary ban must expire in the future.
errors.invalid_ban_kind: Ban kind must be temporary or permanent.
errors.giphy_not_configured: GIF search is not available right now
errors.external_service_unavailable: The GIF service is temporarily unavailable
errors.invalid_gif_query: Please enter a shorter search term
errors.no_shared_team: You can only message members you share a team with
errors.invalid_private_message: Message is empty or too long
errors.invalid_release_steps: A release needs at least one distinct, non-empty step
errors.invalid_release_step: Steps must be validated in order
errors.release_blocked: The release is blocked by an active linked incident

Teams.title: Teams
Teams.directoryDescription: Find a workspace and continue its operational work.
Teams.directorySummary: {members, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} · {incidents} active incidents · {releases} active releases
Teams.workspaceDescription: Team workspace, access and operational ownership.
Teams.overviewUnavailable: The operational overview could not be loaded.
Teams.operationalSummaryDescription: Live work across incidents and releases.
Teams.needsAttentionDescription: The most important actionable work for this team.
Teams.nothingNeedsAttentionDescription: No active incident or release currently requires action.
Teams.yourWorkDescription: {count, plural, =0 {No active incident is assigned to you.} one {# active incident is assigned to you.} other {# active incidents are assigned to you.}}
Teams.operationalScopeDescription: You have read-only access to this team’s active work.

attentionReasons.assignedUnacknowledged: Assigned to you and awaiting acknowledgement

Teams.searchMembers: Search members by email or role
Teams.transferConfirm: Hand over the Manager role to {email}? You will become a Responder.
Teams.deleteTeamDesc: Permanently delete this team and its incidents.
Teams.deleteConfirm: This permanently deletes {name} and all its incidents. Type DELETE to confirm.
Teams.leaveConfirm: Leave {name}? You will lose access to its incidents.
Teams.kickConfirm: Remove {email} from this team? They can rejoin with the invitation code.
Teams.banConfirm: Ban {email} from this team? This removes their membership and blocks rejoining.
Teams.teamIdentityDescription: Stable information shared across the team workspace.
Teams.invitationDescription: Share this code only with people who should join the team.
Teams.invitationFailed: Failed to load the invitation code.
Teams.ownershipDescription: Transfer the single Manager role to another member.
Teams.membershipDescription: Manage your own access to this team.
Teams.bannedMembersDescription: Review active and expired access restrictions.
Teams.noBansInView: No banned members in this view.
Teams.deleteTeamWarning: This removes the team and every resource it owns.
Teams.leaveTeamWarning: You will lose access to this team's incidents and releases.
Teams.joinDesc: Enter the invitation code to join an existing organization.
Teams.createDesc: Create a new organization to coordinate your operations.
Teams.name: Organization Name
Teams.teamUnavailable: This team is unavailable or you are no longer a member.

Automations.title: Automations
Automations.description: Connect an incoming event to a controlled operational reaction for this Team.
Automations.unavailable: Team automations could not be loaded.
Automations.managerOnlyDescription: Only the Team Manager can view credentials, configure connections and change automation rules.
Automations.githubFormDescription: Store the credentials used to verify incoming GitHub webhook deliveries.
Automations.secretPreservedHint: Leave blank to keep the current encrypted secret.
Automations.secretRequiredHint: Choose a strong secret and enter the same value in GitHub.
Automations.tokenHint: Leave blank to preserve the current token. Secrets are encrypted and never shown again.
Automations.httpFormDescription: Choose the external endpoint that receives bounded OpsWarden notifications.
Automations.endpointSecurityHint: Public HTTPS destinations only. Redirects, local networks and credentialed URLs are rejected.
Automations.connectionEmpty: Configure this service before using it in a rule.
Automations.testSucceeded: The endpoint accepted the test notification.
Automations.connectionInUse: Used by {count, plural, one {# rule} other {# rules}}. Remove those references first.
Automations.disconnectDescription: The encrypted credentials and verification state will be removed.
Automations.ruleFormDescription: Build one explicit Action → REAction chain. New rules are saved disabled for review.
Automations.ruleNamePlaceholder: Open an incident when production CI fails
Automations.missingSourceConnection: Connect the source service before saving this rule.
Automations.filtersHint: Every filled value must exactly match the normalized incoming event.
Automations.missingDestinationConnection: Connect the destination service before saving this rule.
Automations.savedDisabledHint: The rule will be saved disabled. Review it in the list, then enable it explicitly.
Automations.noRulesDescription: Create a focused Action → REAction chain after configuring its required connections.
Automations.deleteRuleDescription: Future deliveries will no longer evaluate this rule. Existing run history is preserved.
Automations.noRunsDescription: Runs will appear after a configured service receives an event and evaluates a rule.

Incidents.title: Incidents
Incidents.queueDescription: Triage, assign and follow your team's operational incidents.
Incidents.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, ID or assignee
Incidents.noMatchingIncidentsDesc: Change the view or clear the filters to see the rest of the queue.
Incidents.noIncidentsDesc: No active incidents for this organization.
Incidents.declareDesc: Declare a new incident across your organizations.
Incidents.declareWarning: This will immediately alert the on-call engineers.
Incidents.deleteIncidentConfirm: This permanently deletes « {title} ». Type DELETE to confirm.
Incidents.addNotePlaceholder: Share an update with the team…
Incidents.noActivityDescription: State changes and team notes will appear here.
Incidents.noLinkedReleases: No release is linked to this incident.
Incidents.failedToLoadLinkedReleases: Linked releases could not be loaded.
Incidents.noWatchers: No one else is watching this incident.

Releases.title: Releases
Releases.queueDescription: Track planned deployments, their next step, and the incidents blocking progress.
Releases.detailDescription: Ordered deployment steps and the incidents related to this release.
Releases.noTeamsDesc: Join or create a team to plan releases.
Releases.noReleasesDesc: Create a release to coordinate a deployment.
Releases.noMatchingReleasesDesc: Choose another view to see the rest of the release queue.
Releases.newReleaseDesc: Plan a deployment as ordered, validated steps.
Releases.stepsEditorHint: Add steps in execution order. Use the controls or Alt+Arrow keys to reorder.
Releases.duplicateSteps: Each step needs a distinct name.
Releases.deploymentStepsDescription: Steps are completed in order; later steps cannot be skipped.
Releases.resolveBlockersFirst: Resolve the linked incidents before continuing.
Releases.blockedBannerDescription: {count, plural, one {One active incident must be resolved before this release can continue.} other {# active incidents must be resolved before this release can continue.}}
Releases.linkedIncidentsDescription: Operational issues related to this deployment.
Releases.cancelConfirm: Cancel release “{title}”? This cannot be undone.
